metadata.title: MICROSOFT CORPORATION ANNUAL REPORT (FORM 10-K) FOR THE FISCAL YEAR ENDED JUNE 30, 2025
metadata.summary: This is an annual report filed by Microsoft Corporation with the Securities and Exchange Commission, providing financial information for the fiscal year ended June 30, 2025.
regulatory_references: Section 13 of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934
Section 15(d) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934

metadata.title: Microsoft Corporation Annual Report for Fiscal Year Ended June 30, 2025
metadata.summary: The document is Microsoft's annual report filed with the SEC. It includes financial statements and management discussion of operations.

regulatory_references: Section 13 or 15(d) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934
